title: Cello Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Cello Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Cello Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Pimpri-Chinchwad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Cello Asia Pacific Associates:
Cello Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cello Asia Pacific Associates!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
